# Vault test fixtures

These files are deterministic, non-secret fixtures for vault compatibility tests.

- `keepass-0-6-vault.kdbx` was generated from Arca commit `94a4561` with
  `keepass = 0.6.19`.
- Fixture password: `fixture-master-password`.
- Fixture entry password: `fixture-password`.

The values are intentionally fake and committed only to exercise KDBX
compatibility behavior.
